ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU Usage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., %, MB, ms) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., CPU, memory, network) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric the data point belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the timestamp */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Anomaly score indicating deviation from normal */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Origin of the data point (e.g., monitoring tool, database) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the data point's value */,
  "raw_data" TEXT /* Raw, unprocessed data for auditing or debugging purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point that is anomalous */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected (e.g., Spike, Drop) */,
  "timestamp_detected" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_source" TEXT /* Source of the anomaly detection (e.g., machine learning model, threshold breach) */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the anomaly */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the anomaly has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold setting */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric for which the thresholds apply */,
  "low_threshold" REAL /* Minimum acceptable value for the metric */,
  "high_threshold" REAL /* Maximum acceptable value for the metric */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., absolute, percentage-based) */,
  "threshold_window" INTEGER /* Time window for threshold calculations */,
  "threshold_operator" TEXT /* Logical operator for threshold comparisons (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_thresholds_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, operator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view report) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the user's action */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report (JSON or XML format) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report generation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "report_error" TEXT /* Error message during report generation (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward setting */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric for which the rewards apply */,
  "low_FP_reward" REAL /* Reward for maintaining low false positive rate */,
  "low_FN_reward" REAL /* Reward for maintaining low false negative rate */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., financial, non-financial) */,
  "reward_operator" TEXT /* Operator for reward calculations (e.g., +, -) */,
  "reward_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for reward eligibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric for which the alert applies */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers an alert */,
  "alert_recipients" TEXT /* Email recipients for sending alert notifications */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_notification" TEXT /* Notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_escalation" TEXT /* Escalation procedure for unresolved alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_data" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric being calibrated */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value for the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of calibration adjustment */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the calibration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the system by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., feature request, bug report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., alert_enable) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., true/false) */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., security, notifications) */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog detailing updates or changes in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
